description_long: This is an ornate outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from dark wooden slats, supported by an elaborate wrought iron frame. The ironwork is highly decorative, with intricate scrollwork and curving patterns forming the armrests, legs, and backrest supports. The bench is wide enough to comfortably seat two to three people and has a central decorative flourish at the top of the backrest. The armrests are integrated into the iron frame, providing both support and aesthetic appeal. The overall design suggests durability and elegance, making it suitable for parks, gardens, or upscale urban environments.
description: An ornate bench with dark wooden slats and intricate wrought iron scrollwork, featuring armrests and a decorative backrest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved iron armrest and the profile of the wooden slats.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the bench, the decorative iron backrest, and the seat slats.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with visible scrollwork and wooden slats.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the iron frame's scrollwork and the back of the wooden slats.
attribute_leg_design: ornate curved wrought iron legs with scrollwork
